case_title: GLEN R GARY VS. ROYAL SCOTT JR

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARY, GLEN R AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT JR, ROYAL AN IND DBA ROYAL PAINTING & DECORATING CO. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARY, GLEN R RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCOTT JR, ROYAL AN IND DBA ROYAL PAINTING & DECORATING CO. $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $99.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $349.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
